title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the dashboard.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite having sufficient balance in the account.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button remains greyed out for all previous months.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it in the profile section, but it still displays the old one on invoices.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13. Reinstalling the app did not fix the issue.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago for a cancelled subscription but has not received the amount in their bank yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number. They are locked out of their primary security settings.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets an 'Upload failed' error regardless of the image format or size used.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Error
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription, but the toggle switch is disabled in the UI for their current plan.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though the payment was successful and shown in history.

title: API Integration Documentation Query
description: Developer customer is requesting clarification on the endpoint limits for the public API as the current docs are unclear.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading Times
description: Several users from the same organization report that the analytics dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load data.

title: Bulk Export Data Failure
description: Customer is trying to export 5000+ records to CSV, but the process hangs at 99% every time they attempt the download.

title: Dark Mode UI Glitch
description: When dark mode is enabled, the text in the support chat window remains black, making it impossible to read against the background.
